vocab.meaning: dẫn dắt các sáng kiến chiến lược
vocab.example: In my current role, I spearhead strategic initiatives aimed at expanding our market presence in Southeast Asia.

vocab.meaning: giám sát các hoạt động vận hành hàng ngày
vocab.example: I oversee day-to-day operations to ensure that all team workflows remain efficient and deadlines are met.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng các mối quan hệ khách hàng
vocab.example: A significant part of my remit is to foster client relationships and ensure long-term satisfaction and retention.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa/tinh gọn các quy trình nội bộ
vocab.example: I am constantly looking for ways to streamline internal processes to reduce overhead costs and eliminate redundancies.

vocab.meaning: thực hiện các phân tích khắt khe/kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: My job requires me to conduct rigorous analysis of financial data before presenting quarterly reports to the board.

vocab.meaning: giảm thiểu các rủi ro tiềm tàng
vocab.example: I work closely with the legal team to mitigate potential risks associated with new international contracts.

vocab.meaning: hướng dẫn/dẫn dắt nhân viên cấp dưới
vocab.example: Beyond my technical tasks, I mentor junior staff to help them refine their professional skills and career paths.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo tuân thủ các quy định pháp lý
vocab.example: It is my duty to ensure regulatory compliance across all our manufacturing facilities to avoid any legal setbacks.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng văn hóa cộng tác
vocab.example: I strive to cultivate a collaborative culture within my department to encourage innovative problem-solving.

vocab.meaning: phân bổ nguồn lực một cách hiệu quả
vocab.example: As a project manager, I must allocate resources effectively to keep the project within budget and on schedule.
